title: muzi works Whip Antenna 17cm

test_results.notes: 890-950 MHz sweep captured with a RigExpert Zero II and AntScope2, no ground plane.

description: 915/868 MHz flexible LoRa whip sold by muzi works, SMA Male, 17 cm. muzi lists a measured SWR of ~1.3 (98% efficient) versus a stock stubby at SWR 3.5.
commentary: muzi works' 17 cm flexible SMA whip — a community favorite for pocket and portable nodes. It tunes and performs well across the 915 MHz band.
